# Chapter 4: Error and uncertainty  (~100 pp)

- 4.1 Random vs systematic error (10)
- 4.2 Distribution of error: gaussian, uniform, asymmetric (12)
- 4.3 Propagation of uncertainty: linear and Monte Carlo (18)
- 4.4 The central limit theorem in practice (10)
- 4.5 Significant figures, rounding, reporting (10)
- 4.6 Confidence intervals as engineering tools (15)
- 4.7 The cost of a smaller error bar (10)
- 4.8 Failure section: error bars that were politically chosen (15)

**Archetype**: uncertainty (first formal introduction).
**Project**: measure the height of a building three different ways, compare error bars.
**Exercises**: 35.
